raw_text: sam simaei 110 queen street, sheffield, uk +44-77-24002626 sahand.si@gmail.com personal statement a motivated, adaptable and responsible software engineering student. from my previous experience, i have developed a keen sense of meeting customer aspirations and a strong drive to see things through to completion with a strong emphasis on detail. i am versatile in communicating in three different languages: turkish, persian & english. key skills self-motivated and able to work with minimum supervision ability to consistently maintain a positive attitude able to cooperatively work with others to produce and deliver required work flexible in attitude, whilst maintaining enthusiasm and commitment to each project proficiency in all areas of macos, ios, and hardware proficiency in all areas of windows articulate and very effective at working with people of different backgrounds and temperaments education sheffield hallam university (2016 -) database systems for software applications group software development project networked software development canadian university of dubai (bachelor of business marketing) (2012 2016) courses: e- marketing marketing management advertising & promotion international marketing work experience pet mart store & salon (co-owner, manager) (2012 - 2016) duties included: overseeing other employees and guiding them towards the goal needed implementing manager orders and fulfilling the complaints if any helping customers with special request and fulfilling their needs hardware assembly assistant, red rose computers (2010 2011) duties included: full knowledge of computer hardware assembly knowledge of windows and applications related to it learning to be a team player and how-to co-ordinate with other team members significantly improved negotiation skills, regularly converting customers from initial enquiry to sale hobbies & interests during my spare time, i like to keep myself up-to date with the latest technological advancement in software and hardware. this would include reading articles, watching press conferences and reading news online. technology aside, i also enjoy outdoor activities such as football, tennis and ping pong. whilst technology has a huge role in my life, i always make time for exploring the natural environment and exercise my favourite hobby of photography.
